pr.title: Mamba-3 SSD + Attention Hybrid with QAT (1.5633 bpb)

output.summary: Hybrid stacks Mamba-3 SISO SSD blocks with a lone causal attention layer, GLU values, and Muon optimizer while expanding QAT to SSD projections for tighter quantization.
techniques: Hybrid Mamba-3 SSD blocks plus a single attention layer with GLU values
Extend QAT to Mamba-3 in_proj/out_proj via CastedLinear to cover SSD projections
Muon optimizer tuning and Muon SOTA params
